name: kb Remaining Implementation (Phases 2-4)
objective: Complete the web UI, sub-agent orchestration, and polish/distribution for kb kanban board
exit_criteria: kb serve launches a working web UI with board view, card detail, drag-and-drop, and live updates
kb spawn launches a sub-agent with correct context injection
kb recover detects and cleans orphaned worktrees
pip install works and includes bundled web assets
